cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Naive Digital Selfie Avatar

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Naive Digital Selfie Avatar
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 天真风格数字自拍头像

cases.promptPreview: Create a naive digital selfie avatar illustration of {argument name="character name" default="a young person"} from the shoulders up, centered and facing the viewer with a simple direct smile. Use a square 1:1 canvas with a plain pastel sky-blue background. The character has {argument name="hair color" default="messy ...

prompts.en: Create a naive digital selfie avatar illustration of {argument name="character name" default="a young person"} from the shoulders up, centered and facing the viewer with a simple direct smile. Use a square 1:1 canvas with a plain pastel sky-blue background. The character has {argument name="hair color" default="messy black"} medium-length shaggy hair peeking out from under a {argument name="hat color" default="green"} backward baseball cap with a small metal ring detail on the left side. Dress them in a blue denim collared zip shirt layered under a beige-and-brown checkered jacket. Render in a playful naive digital painting style with rough crayon-like texture, visible brush strokes, soft flat colors, simplified anatomy, minimal facial detail, warm peach skin tones, and an everyday casual selfie composition. Keep the crop close, with the head large in frame and the shoulders filling the lower third. Avoid photorealism, hard outlines, text, logos, or complex background details.
prompts.zh: 创作一张 {argument name="character name" default="年轻人"} 的天真风格数字自拍头像插画，构图为肩部以上，居中且面向镜头，带着简单直接的微笑。使用 1:1 的方形画布，背景为纯净的淡天蓝色。角色留着 {argument name="hair color" default="凌乱的黑色"} 中长蓬松乱发，从 {argument name="hat color" default="绿色"} 反戴棒球帽下露出，左侧带有小金属环细节。身穿蓝色牛仔翻领拉链衬衫，外搭一件米棕色格纹夹克。采用俏皮的天真数字绘画风格渲染，具有粗糙的蜡笔质感、可见的笔触、柔和的平涂色彩、简化的解剖结构、极简的面部细节、温暖的桃色肤色以及日常休闲的自拍构图。保持近景裁剪，头部在画面中占比大，肩膀填满下三分之一区域。避免照片级真实感、硬轮廓线、文字、标志或复杂的背景细节。

descriptions.en: Generates a casual square selfie-style illustrated avatar with a cap, shaggy hair, and textured naive digital painting aesthetics.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张休闲方形自拍风格的插画头像，带有鸭舌帽、蓬松乱发以及质感十足的天真数字绘画美学。

cases.author: Eric Kang - Vogue AI

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Formal Business Headshot Profile Poster

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Formal Business Headshot Profile Poster
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 正式商务头像个人资料海报

cases.promptPreview: Goal: Create a formal business headshot profile poster for a fictional adult design professional, combining a clean studio portrait with an elegant nameplate area. Canvas: Vertical 4:5 poster, approximately 768 x 960 px, crisp high-resolution corporate profile design. Portrait area: Upper 70% of the image shows a cent...

prompts.en:
Goal: Create a formal business headshot profile poster for a fictional adult design professional, combining a clean studio portrait with an elegant nameplate area.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 poster, approximately 768 x 960 px, crisp high-resolution corporate profile design.

Portrait area: Upper 70% of the image shows a centered waist-up studio headshot of an adult woman with {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} shoulder-length softly waved hair, wearing a dark navy tailored blazer over a white open-collar dress shirt. She has a professional upright pose with arms subtly crossed or held close, photographed against a pure white background with soft even studio lighting. Add a large centered rectangular anonymization block over the face, using a smooth skin-tone/brown gradient, covering the facial features from forehead to chin while leaving hair, ears, neck, and clothing visible.

Lower profile panel: Bottom 30% is a dark near-black navy rectangular information panel spanning the full width. Add a thin metallic gold line along the top edge of the panel, with a small angular gold accent notch near the upper-right edge. The design should feel premium, minimalist, and editorial.

Text content: Place exactly 3 text elements on the lower panel, aligned left with generous margins: 1) large white serif name text: {argument name="character name" default="Yuna Koizumi"}; 2) smaller gold sans-serif job title: {argument name="job title" default="Senior Graphic Designer"}; 3) smaller light gray sans-serif organization text: {argument name="organization" default="International Design Institute"}. Add exactly 1 short horizontal gold divider line beneath the name, aligned with the left text column.

Visual style: Professional LinkedIn-style executive portrait mixed with luxury editorial typography, realistic photography, clean composition, high contrast navy-white-gold palette, refined spacing, no clutter.

Constraints: Use exactly one portrait subject, exactly one face-obscuring rectangle, exactly one lower information panel, exactly one gold divider line under the name, and exactly three text lines. Do not add logos, icons, watermarks, extra captions, background patterns, or additional people.
prompts.zh:
目标：为一位虚构的成年设计专业人士制作一张正式的商务头像个人资料海报，将干净的摄影棚肖像与优雅的名牌区域相结合。

画布：垂直 4:5 海报，约 768 x 960 像素，清晰的高分辨率企业资料设计。

肖像区域：图像上方 70% 展示一位成年女性居中的半身摄影棚头像，留着 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 肩长柔和波浪卷发，身穿深藏青色定制西装外套，内搭白色开领衬衫。她保持着专业的挺拔姿势，双臂微微交叉或自然垂放，以纯白色背景为底，配以柔和均匀的摄影棚灯光。在面部上方添加一个居中的大型矩形匿名遮挡块，使用平滑的肤色/棕色渐变，覆盖从额头到下巴的面部特征，同时保留头发、耳朵、脖子和服装可见。

底部资料面板：底部 30% 为一个横跨全宽的深近黑色藏青色矩形信息面板。在面板顶部边缘添加一条细金属金线，并在右上角边缘附近添加一个小角度的金色装饰切口。设计应呈现出高级、极简和编辑风格。

文本内容：在底部面板上放置 3 个文本元素，左对齐并留出充足边距：1) 大型白色衬线字体姓名：{argument name="character name" default="Yuna Koizumi"}；2) 较小的金色无衬线字体职位：{argument name="job title" default="资深平面设计师"}；3) 较小的浅灰色无衬线字体机构名称：{argument name="organization" default="国际设计学院"}。在姓名下方添加 1 条与左侧文本列对齐的短水平金色分隔线。

视觉风格：专业的 LinkedIn 风格高管肖像与奢华编辑排版相结合，写实摄影，构图简洁，藏青色-白色-金色高对比度配色，精致的间距，无杂乱元素。

约束条件：仅使用一个肖像主体，仅使用一个面部遮挡矩形，仅使用一个底部信息面板，姓名下方仅使用一条金色分隔线，且仅包含三行文本。请勿添加徽标、图标、水印、额外说明文字、背景图案或额外人物。

descriptions.en: Creates a polished corporate profile poster with a studio business portrait, anonymized face block, and elegant navy-and-gold nameplate for professional bios or mockups.
descriptions.zh: 制作一张精致的企业个人资料海报，包含摄影棚商务肖像、匿名面部遮挡块以及优雅的藏青色配金色名牌，适用于专业简介或样机展示。

cases.author: Eric Kang - Vogue AI

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Photo to Sunlit Anime Character

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Photo to Sunlit Anime Character
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 害羞动漫少女怀抱鲨鱼玩偶

cases.promptPreview: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base, transform the photo into a polished anime-style illustration while preserving the same overall pose, camera angle, white oversized shirt, shark plush being hugged, window-side indoor setting, and warm backlit mood. Replace the obscured face with a cute expressive anime face: soft blush, ...

prompts.en:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the base, transform the photo into a polished anime-style illustration while preserving the same overall pose, camera angle, white oversized shirt, shark plush being hugged, window-side indoor setting, and warm backlit mood. Replace the obscured face with a cute expressive anime face: soft blush, slightly shy eyes, and the hand still raised near the mouth. Keep the short black bob silhouette but make it glossy and stylized, with red-tinted hair tips and 3 visible hair accessories: 2 silver rectangular hair clips and 1 gray X-shaped pin. Render the scene with clean line art, detailed painterly shading, luminous sunlight, soft highlights on fabric, and a high-quality visual-novel/anime key art finish.

Add and clarify the room details that were only vague in the reference: a teal-green wall, a framed ocean-and-cloud picture on the wall, a wooden dresser on the right, a white vase with exactly 3 yellow flowers, and 1 small framed photo on the dresser. Add a few subtle floating dust motes/bubbles in the sunlight. Make the shark plush more cute and crisp, with a blue top, white belly, black eye, gill marks, fin, tail, and open mouth with triangular teeth.

Customizable details: anime character with {argument name="eye color" default="red"}, {argument name="hair accent color" default="red"}, wearing {argument name="shirt style" default="oversized white button-up shirt"}, holding {argument name="plush toy" default="blue shark plush"}, in a {argument name="background mood" default="warm sunlit bedroom by a window"}.

Constraints: do not crop out the plush, keep the composition vertical, keep the pose and outfit close to the reference, avoid photorealism, avoid extra characters, avoid text or watermarks.
prompts.zh: 创作一张精致的竖构图动漫插画，描绘一位在柔和灯光卧室中的害羞少女，画面从大腿中部向上，她正将一只大型鲨鱼毛绒玩具抱在胸前。角色拥有 {argument name="hair color" default="带有红色内挑染的黑色短波波头"}，皮肤白皙，脸颊绯红，红色的眼睛，表情羞涩，一只手抬起遮住嘴巴。在刘海一侧加上银色的小发夹。她穿着一件宽松的 {argument name="shirt color" default="白色"} 大号长袖衬衫，领口敞开，衣褶柔软，在温暖的阳光下呈现出微妙的半透明感，营造出一种温柔私密的早晨氛围，无任何露骨内容。鲨鱼玩偶又大又可爱，背部蓝灰色，腹部白色，有一只黑色的珠子眼睛、鳃痕、侧鳍、尾巴以及露出三角形牙齿的张开嘴巴。场景设定在一间舒适的卧室，左侧有一扇高大的窗户，挂着米色薄纱窗帘，金色的阳光倾泻而入，投下明亮的高光和长长的阴影。背景中包含 5 个清晰可见的房间细节：墙上挂着 1 幅海洋与云朵的画框，1 张床头柜，1 个插着黄色花朵的花瓶，1 个小相框，以及 1 个木制抽屉柜。采用精致的日式动漫风格，配合绘画感的光影、柔和的腮红调、光泽感的发丝高光、细腻的布料褶皱、浅景深、温暖的尘埃微粒，以及 3:4 的竖构图。保持温柔、安静且略带尴尬的氛围；无文字，无水印，无多余角色。

descriptions.en: Transforms a reference photo into a polished anime illustration while preserving the pose, outfit, plush toy, and cozy window-side setting.
descriptions.zh: 一张竖构图的动漫卧室插画，描绘了一位穿着大号衬衫的脸红少女正抱着可爱的鲨鱼玩偶，非常适合用于角色艺术生成。

cases.author: AIAI.COM

cases.title: YouTube Thumbnail - Japanese Developer Comment Banner

titles.en: YouTube Thumbnail - Japanese Developer Comment Banner
titles.zh: YouTube 缩略图 - 日式开发者评论横幅

cases.promptPreview: Create a transparent-background decorative Japanese lower-third banner for a short video overlay. Canvas: wide horizontal 3:1 ratio, about 1200×400 px, with a light gray checkerboard transparency preview behind the artwork. Main object: a cream-white rounded rectangular speech-bubble plaque spanning most of the width,...

prompts.en: Create a transparent-background decorative Japanese lower-third banner for a short video overlay. Canvas: wide horizontal 3:1 ratio, about 1200×400 px, with a light gray checkerboard transparency preview behind the artwork. Main object: a cream-white rounded rectangular speech-bubble plaque spanning most of the width, with layered offset shadows and thin gold and pale blue outline strokes, slightly vintage stationery style. Layout: place a small tab on the upper left of the plaque containing a circular icon of a laptop with code brackets and the label {argument name="category label" default="開発者コメント"}; place the main headline centered in large elegant Japanese Mincho-style calligraphy reading {argument name="headline text" default="ハイネを消す方法"}, with the characters for “消す” colored muted blue while the rest is black. On the left side inside the plaque, include exactly 1 watercolor-style dolphin illustration facing right, pale blue-gray. On the upper right, overlapping the plaque, add exactly 1 comic burst sticker with scalloped edges, beige outline, and handwritten text {argument name="sound effect text" default="ピコン"}, plus exactly 2 exclamation mark rays. Decorative details: include exactly 6 small sparkle stars distributed around the dolphin, headline, and right edge; exactly 1 thin blue wavy underline beneath the headline; exactly 4 tiny dots near the lower right center; subtle beige halftone dot patches on the left and right; small gold ornamental corner flourishes. Visual style: soft pastel cream, dusty blue, muted gold, clean Japanese YouTube Shorts caption graphic, gentle drop shadows, crisp vector edges mixed with light watercolor texture. Constraints: no characters or people, no extra text, keep the banner readable with generous empty space, preserve a transparent PNG overlay feel.
prompts.zh: 创建一个用于短视频叠加的透明背景装饰性日式下三分之一横幅。画布：宽横向 3:1 比例，约 1200×400 像素，艺术作品后方带有浅灰色棋盘格透明预览。主体：一个米白色圆角矩形对话气泡牌，横跨大部分宽度，带有分层偏移阴影以及细金线和淡蓝色轮廓描边，呈现出轻微的复古文具风格。布局：在牌子左上角放置一个小标签，内含一个带有代码括号的笔记本电脑圆形图标，标签文字为 {argument name="category label" default="开发人员评论"}；将主标题居中放置，使用优雅的大号日式明朝体书法，文字为 {argument name="headline text" default="如何删除 Heine"}，其中“删除”二字为柔和的蓝色，其余为黑色。在牌子内部左侧，包含 1 个面向右侧的水彩风格海豚插图，颜色为淡蓝灰色。在右上角，与牌子重叠处，添加 1 个带有扇形边缘的漫画爆破贴纸，米色轮廓，手写文字为 {argument name="sound effect text" default="叮"}，外加 2 个感叹号射线。装饰细节：在海豚、标题和右边缘周围分布 6 个小闪烁星；标题下方有 1 条细蓝色波浪下划线；右下中心附近有 4 个微小圆点；左右两侧有微妙的米色半调网点斑块；角落有精致的金色装饰花纹。视觉风格：柔和的奶油色、灰蓝色、柔和的金色，简洁的日式 YouTube Shorts 字幕图形，柔和的投影，清晰的矢量边缘与轻微的水彩质感相结合。约束：无人物或角色，无额外文字，保持横幅清晰易读并留有充足的空白空间，保留透明 PNG 叠加感。

descriptions.en: A decorative transparent-style Japanese lower-third banner for adding developer comments or captions to short videos.
descriptions.zh: 一款装饰性透明风格的日式下三分之一横幅，用于在短视频中添加开发者评论或字幕。

cases.author: kenta@AIVTuberテセウス•ノ•ハイネ開発者

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Ancient Hanfu Sketch Comes Alive

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Ancient Hanfu Sketch Comes Alive
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 古风汉服草图跃然纸上

cases.promptPreview: Goal: Create a 4:5 vertical image titled {argument name="artwork concept" default="Paper Becomes Real · Ancient-Style Costume Draft"}, showing an elegant ancient Chinese clothing design sketch awakening into reality on paper. Canvas and camera: Overhead view with a slight diagonal perspective, warm natural studio ligh...

prompts.en:
Goal: Create a 4:5 vertical image titled {argument name="artwork concept" default="Paper Becomes Real · Ancient-Style Costume Draft"}, showing an elegant ancient Chinese clothing design sketch awakening into reality on paper.

Canvas and camera: Overhead view with a slight diagonal perspective, warm natural studio lighting, photorealistic details mixed with pencil fashion-sketch illustration. A large off-white garment-design sheet is clipped to a wooden drawing board on a warm brown wooden worktable.

Main subject: One adult Chinese ancient-style beauty lies diagonally across the design paper as if emerging from the drawing. Her upper body is realistic and three-dimensional, while the lower skirt gradually transitions into pale watercolor fabric and pencil sketch lines. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square mosaic blur. She has long black hair styled half-up with delicate silver floral hairpins, pearl tassels, and a small pale green ornament. Outfit: {argument name="costume palette" default="moon-white sheer gauze with pale mist-blue layers"}; translucent Hanfu-style robe, soft white inner wrap, pale blue embroidered collar and sash, layered gauze sleeves, flowing ribbon belt, pearl tassel accessory at the waist, and a long skirt fading into sketchy lines near the hem.

Layout and visible design labels: Include exactly 5 handwritten annotation groups on the paper: 1) top right title “LOOK 01” underlined; 2) near the head, “hair ornament” with Chinese-style notes and a small floral hairpin sketch; 3) left side, “sleeve volume” with a sleeve silhouette sketch; 4) right side, “ribbon flow” with arrows and ribbon movement lines; 5) lower left, “skirt movement” with arrows and skirt-flow sketch lines. Use neat pencil handwriting with small bilingual-looking notes, but keep the English labels readable.

Surrounding objects: Place exactly 7 studio props around the board: 1) a pale ceramic teacup at the upper left; 2) small paper color swatches at the left edge; 3) a pale jade pendant with tassel near the lower left; 4) two fabric swatches in white and mist blue at the bottom left; 5) a calligraphy paperweight or carved wooden block with a vertical calligraphy strip at the upper right; 6) two drawing pens on the right side; 7) one artist hand entering from the lower right holding a pencil and actively sketching the skirt hem.

Visual style: High-end ancient Chinese fashion portrait plus costume design manuscript, delicate fabric transparency, realistic skin and hands, graphite pencil construction lines, pale blue-gray watercolor washes, soft shadows, tactile paper texture, cinematic but quiet atelier atmosphere. Emphasize the illusion that a 2D/3D costume sketch is breaking through the page into real life.

Constraints: No extra characters, no modern clothing on the main subject, no clutter beyond the listed props, preserve the 4:5 vertical composition, keep the annotations subtle and hand-drawn, avoid logos or watermarks.
prompts.zh:
目标：创作一张比例为 4:5 的竖版图像，标题为 {argument name="artwork concept" default="纸上生花 · 古风服饰草稿"}，展示一幅优雅的中国古代服饰设计草图在纸上觉醒并化为现实的画面。

画布与镜头：俯视视角，带有轻微的对角线透视，采用温暖的自然摄影棚光线，将照片级写实细节与铅笔时装草图风格相结合。一张米白色的服装设计大纸被夹在暖棕色木质工作台上的木制项目上。

主体：一位成年中国古风美人斜卧在设计纸上，仿佛正从画中浮现。她的上半身呈现出写实且立体的质感，而下半身的裙摆逐渐过渡为淡雅的水彩布料与铅笔草图线条。她的面部被刻意处理为柔和的方形马赛克模糊效果。她留着黑色长发，半扎发髻，饰有精致的银色花卉发簪、珍珠流苏及一个小巧的淡绿色饰品。服装：{argument name="costume palette" default="月白色轻纱搭配淡雾蓝色叠层"}；半透明汉服长袍，柔软的白色内衬，淡蓝色刺绣领口与腰带，层叠的纱袖，飘逸的丝带腰带，腰间配有珍珠流苏饰品，长裙下摆渐变为草图线条。

布局与可见设计标注：纸上需包含 5 组手写注释：1) 右上角标题“LOOK 01”并带有下划线；2) 头部附近标注“hair ornament”（发饰），配有中式风格笔记和一个小巧的花卉发簪草图；3) 左侧标注“sleeve volume”（袖量），配有袖子轮廓草图；4) 右侧标注“ribbon flow”（丝带飘动），配有箭头和丝带运动线条；5) 左下角标注“skirt movement”（裙摆动态），配有箭头和裙摆流动草图线条。使用整洁的铅笔手写体，并配以看起来像双语的简短笔记，但需确保英文标签清晰可读。

周边物品：在项目周围放置 7 个摄影棚道具：1) 左上角一个淡色陶瓷茶杯；2) 左边缘的小块纸质色样；3) 左下角附近一个带流苏的浅色玉佩；4) 左下角两块白色和雾蓝色的布料样板；5) 右上角一个书法镇纸或雕花木块，配有一条竖式书法纸条；6) 右侧两支绘图笔；7) 右下角伸入一只艺术家的手，正握着铅笔在绘制裙摆下缘。

视觉风格：高端中国古风时装肖像与服饰设计手稿结合，细腻的布料透明感，写实的皮肤与手部细节，石墨铅笔构图线，淡蓝灰色水彩晕染，柔和的阴影，真实的纸张纹理，电影感且静谧的画室氛围。强调 2D/3D 服装草图突破纸面进入现实的错觉。

约束条件：禁止出现额外角色，主体不得穿着现代服装，除所列道具外不得有杂乱物品，保持 4:5 竖版构图，注释需保持微妙且手绘感，避免出现任何 Logo 或水印。

descriptions.en: A photorealistic ancient Chinese costume design sheet where a gauzy Hanfu-clad beauty emerges from pencil and watercolor sketches.
descriptions.zh: 一张照片级写实的中国古代服饰设计图，描绘了一位身着轻纱汉服的美人从铅笔和水彩草图中浮现而出的场景。

cases.author: Larus Canus

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Claude Code Breaking News Infographic

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - Claude Code Breaking News Infographic
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - Claude Code 速报信息图

cases.promptPreview: Goal: Create a hand-drawn breaking-news style infographic in Japanese about {argument name="headline topic" default="Claude Code implementing infographic image generation for X breaking-news posts"}. Canvas: 16:9 horizontal image, dark navy chalkboard background, rough marker and chalk texture, high-contrast red, oran...

prompts.en:
Goal: Create a hand-drawn breaking-news style infographic in Japanese about {argument name="headline topic" default="Claude Code implementing infographic image generation for X breaking-news posts"}.

Canvas: 16:9 horizontal image, dark navy chalkboard background, rough marker and chalk texture, high-contrast red, orange, yellow, white, and cream colors. Use imperfect hand-lettering, sketchy outlines, brush strokes, and doodle icons. No photorealism.

Layout: Left side has 1 tall vertical red breaking-news banner with a white border, large white Japanese text 「速報」 stacked vertically, and 1 yellow lightning bolt near the bottom. Top center has 1 wide red-to-orange brush-stroke headline banner with 1 yellow lightning icon on the left and 1 megaphone icon on the right. Under it is 1 rounded source bar. Main middle area contains exactly 2 large rounded rectangular information panels stacked vertically. Right side contains exactly 2 smaller rounded cards stacked vertically: a source-information card above and a date/time card below. Bottom row contains exactly 3 hashtag pills.

Text content: Top headline banner text: 「Claude Code」 on the first line, then 「インフォグラフィック画像生成機能を」, then 「X速報投稿に実装」. Source bar text: 「SOURCE: zenn-blog-automation PR #217」. Right source card text: 「情報源:」 then 「zenn-blog-automation」 then 「PR #217」. First main panel text: 「GPT-IMAGE-2で」, 「breaking_newsテーマの」, 「インフォグラフィックを生成し」, 「X速報投稿に添付できるようになった。」 Include a small orange label reading 「GPT-IMAGE-2」 on an image-thumbnail icon. Second main panel text: 「画像生成失敗時は」, 「テキストのみ投稿にフォールバック。」 Date/time card text: 「検出日時:」 then {argument name="timestamp" default="2026/06/24 19:15 JST"}. Bottom hashtag pills must read exactly 3 labels: {argument name="hashtag one" default="#claudecode"}, {argument name="hashtag two" default="#anthropic"}, and {argument name="hashtag three" default="#ai"}.

Discrete visual elements to include: exactly 1 left vertical banner, 1 top headline brush banner, 1 source bar, 2 main info panels, 2 right-side cards, 3 hashtag pills, 2 yellow lightning bolts total, 1 megaphone, 1 document icon, 1 clock icon, 1 image-thumbnail icon with mountains, 2 orange arrow icons pointing right, 1 cloud-with-X failure icon, and 1 speech bubble with three dots.

Visual style: Energetic Japanese breaking-news infographic, marker poster look, slightly irregular white handwritten type, orange rounded borders, yellow underline highlights under important phrases, small decorative radiating accent marks around the megaphone, banner, and hashtags. Keep the composition dense but readable, with strong hierarchy and a dramatic emergency-news feel.

Constraints: Use Japanese text exactly as specified, do not add extra sections or extra hashtags, keep all icons hand-drawn, avoid logos, avoid watermarks, and maintain the rough chalk-and-paint texture throughout.
prompts.zh:
目标：创建一张日式手绘风格的速报信息图，主题为 {argument name="headline topic" default="Claude Code 实现用于 X 速报帖子的信息图生成功能"}。

画布：16:9 横向图片，深蓝色黑板背景，粗糙的马克笔和粉笔质感，采用高对比度的红色、橙色、黄色、白色和奶油色。使用不规则的手写字体、草图轮廓、笔触和涂鸦图标。拒绝照片级真实感。

布局：左侧设有一个带白色边框的竖长红色速报横幅，垂直堆叠白色大号日文「速报」字样，底部附近有一个黄色闪电图标。顶部中央设有一个宽大的红橙渐变笔触标题横幅，左侧配有 1 个黄色闪电图标，右侧配有 1 个扩音器图标。下方是一个圆角来源栏。中间主要区域包含 2 个垂直堆叠的大型圆角矩形信息面板。右侧包含 2 个垂直堆叠的小型圆角卡片：上方为来源信息卡，下方为日期/时间卡。底部一行包含 3 个标签胶囊。

文本内容：顶部标题横幅文字：第一行「Claude Code」，第二行「インフォグラフィック画像生成機能を」，第三行「X速報投稿に実装」。来源栏文字：「SOURCE: zenn-blog-automation PR #217」。右侧来源卡文字：「情報源:」然后是「zenn-blog-automation」和「PR #217」。第一个主面板文字：「GPT-IMAGE-2で」、「breaking_newsテーマの」、「インフォグラフィックを生成し」、「X速報投稿に添付できるようになった。」在图像缩略图图标上包含一个写有「GPT-IMAGE-2」的小型橙色标签。第二个主面板文字：「画像生成失敗時は」、「テキストのみ投稿にフォールバック。」日期/时间卡文字：「検出日時:」然后是 {argument name="timestamp" default="2026/06/24 19:15 JST"}。底部标签胶囊必须包含 3 个标签：{argument name="hashtag one" default="#claudecode"}、{argument name="hashtag two" default="#anthropic"} 以及 {argument name="hashtag three" default="#ai"}。

需包含的离散视觉元素：1 个左侧竖向横幅、1 个顶部标题笔触横幅、1 个来源栏、2 个主信息面板、2 个右侧卡片、3 个标签胶囊、共 2 个黄色闪电图标、1 个扩音器、1 个文档图标、1 个时钟图标、1 个带山脉图案的图像缩略图图标、2 个指向右侧的橙色箭头图标、1 个带 X 的云朵失败图标，以及 1 个带三个点的对话气泡。

视觉风格：充满活力的日式速报信息图，马克笔海报外观，略显不规则的白色手写字体，橙色圆角边框，重要短语下方有黄色下划线高亮，扩音器、横幅和标签周围有小型装饰性放射状强调标记。保持构图紧凑但易读，具有强烈的层级感和戏剧性的紧急新闻氛围。

约束：严格使用指定的日文文本，不要添加额外的部分或标签，所有图标保持手绘风格，避免使用 Logo，避免水印，并全程保持粗糙的粉笔和颜料质感。

descriptions.en: Generates a Japanese hand-drawn breaking-news infographic for announcing a Claude Code feature update on X.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张日式手绘风格的速报信息图，用于在 X 上发布 Claude Code 功能更新。

cases.author: 甲斐甲

cases.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Exploded Tennis Racquet Blueprint

titles.en: Infographic / Edu Visual - Exploded Tennis Racquet Blueprint
titles.zh: 信息图 / 教育视觉图 - 网球拍爆炸图蓝图

cases.promptPreview: Goal: Create a clean technical blueprint-style exploded diagram of {argument name="sports equipment" default="a tennis racquet and ball"}, labeled like an instruction manual figure. Canvas: Portrait 3:4 composition on an off-white paper background with lots of negative space. Use thin cobalt-blue line art, monoline dr...

prompts.en:
Goal: Create a clean technical blueprint-style exploded diagram of {argument name="sports equipment" default="a tennis racquet and ball"}, labeled like an instruction manual figure.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 composition on an off-white paper background with lots of negative space. Use thin cobalt-blue line art, monoline drafting strokes, pale blue translucent fills only where needed, and subtle print texture. No shadows except very light flat blue fill on the ball core.

Layout: Place the exploded tennis racquet vertically on the left two-thirds of the canvas, with parts separated along a central vertical axis. Place the exploded tennis ball cross-section on the right-middle. Add dashed vertical guide lines framing each exploded assembly and dashed horizontal callout lines leading to labels on the right of each part. Use small all-caps monospaced blueprint lettering.

Header and footer text: Put "FIG.002" in the top-left corner. Put "[ RACQUET AND BALL ]" in the top-right corner. Put "COPYRIGHT 2026" in the bottom-right corner.

Discrete elements: Show exactly 13 main visible components total: 7 racquet components and 6 ball/callout-related components. The 7 racquet components, from top to bottom, are: 1) FRAME, an oval racquet head rim with small evenly spaced holes around the inner edge and a partial yoke connection; 2) STRING BED, a separate oval mesh insert made of dense diagonal crisscross strings with tiny perimeter nodes; 3) THROAT, a forked triangular bridge piece with open cutouts; 4) SHAFT, a short cylindrical handle connector with a rectangular inset detail and a circular end opening; 5) GRIP, a longer wrapped cylindrical grip with spiral bands; 6) BUTT CAP, a small hexagonal end cap below the grip; 7) dashed alignment box and callout construction lines surrounding the racquet assembly. The 6 ball/callout-related components are: 1) top white curved FELT shell piece; 2) central blue spherical CORE with a circular ring contour on top; 3) bottom white curved FELT shell piece; 4) dashed vertical guide lines around the ball assembly; 5) dashed horizontal label line to FELT; 6) dashed horizontal label line to CORE.

Labels: Add exactly 7 callout labels in blue uppercase text: FRAME, STRING BED, THROAT, SHAFT, GRIP, BUTT CAP, FELT, and CORE. Place racquet labels to the right of the racquet parts and ball labels to the right of the ball parts. Keep labels aligned and minimal.

Visual style: Minimal futuristic technical illustration, exploded product schematic, precise vector-like geometry, thin blue outlines, light blue hatching/mesh for the string bed, no photorealism, no people, no court, no extra decorations.

Constraints: Keep the racquet head slightly tilted in perspective at the top, the string bed floating below it, and all handle parts stacked downward with visible gaps. The ball should appear as a simple cutaway with two separated felt shell halves and one blue core. Use {argument name="line color" default="cobalt blue"} linework on {argument name="background color" default="warm off-white"} paper, with {argument name="figure number" default="FIG.002"} and {argument name="copyright text" default="COPYRIGHT 2026"}.
prompts.zh:
目标：创建一个简洁的技术蓝图风格爆炸图，展示 {argument name="sports equipment" default="网球拍和网球"}，并像说明书插图一样进行标注。

画布：3:4 纵向构图，采用米白色纸张背景，留有大量负空间。使用纤细的钴蓝色线条、单线绘图笔触，仅在必要处使用淡蓝色半透明填充，并带有细微的印刷纹理。除球核处有极淡的平铺蓝色填充外，无其他阴影。

布局：将爆炸的网球拍垂直放置在画布左侧三分之二处，各部件沿中心垂直轴分离。将爆炸的网球横截面放置在右侧中部。添加虚线垂直引导线以框定每个爆炸组件，并添加虚线水平引出线指向各部件右侧的标签。使用小型全大写等宽蓝图字体。

页眉和页脚文本：在左上角放置 "FIG.002"。在右上角放置 "[ RACQUET AND BALL ]"。在右下角放置 "COPYRIGHT 2026"。

离散元素：总共显示 13 个主要可见组件：7 个球拍组件和 6 个球体/标注相关组件。7 个球拍组件从上到下依次为：1) FRAME（拍框），带有均匀间隔小孔的椭圆形拍头边缘及局部叉状连接；2) STRING BED（拍面），由密集的对角交叉线组成的独立椭圆形网状插件，带有微小的周边节点；3) THROAT（拍喉），带有开放式切口的叉状三角形连接件；4) SHAFT（拍杆），带有矩形嵌入细节和圆形末端开口的短圆柱形连接件；5) GRIP（手柄），带有螺旋带的加长缠绕式圆柱形手柄；6) BUTT CAP（拍柄底盖），手柄下方的小型六角形端盖；7) 环绕球拍组件的虚线对齐框和标注构造线。6 个球体/标注相关组件为：1) 顶部白色弧形 FELT（毛毡）外壳片；2) 顶部带有圆形环状轮廓的中央蓝色球形 CORE（球核）；3) 底部白色弧形 FELT（毛毡）外壳片；4) 环绕球体组件的虚线垂直引导线；5) 指向 FELT 的虚线水平标签线；6) 指向 CORE 的虚线水平标签线。

标签：添加 7 个蓝色大写文本标注：FRAME、STRING BED、THROAT、SHAFT、GRIP、BUTT CAP、FELT 和 CORE。将球拍标签放置在球拍部件右侧，球体标签放置在球体部件右侧。保持标签对齐且简洁。

视觉风格：极简未来主义技术插图、产品爆炸示意图、精确的矢量几何图形、纤细的蓝色轮廓、拍面使用淡蓝色阴影/网格，无照片级真实感，无人像，无球场，无额外装饰。

约束：保持拍头在顶部略微倾斜，拍面悬浮于其下方，所有手柄部件向下堆叠并留有可见间隙。球体应呈现为简单的剖面图，包含两个分离的毛毡外壳半球和一个蓝色球核。在 {argument name="background color" default="暖米色"} 纸张上使用 {argument name="line color" default="钴蓝色"} 线条，并标注 {argument name="figure number" default="FIG.002"} 和 {argument name="copyright text" default="COPYRIGHT 2026"}。

descriptions.en: A blueprint-style exploded technical diagram of a tennis racquet and ball, useful for mockups, vector extraction, or sports equipment concept visuals.
descriptions.zh: 一种网球拍和网球的蓝图风格技术爆炸图，适用于模型制作、矢量提取或体育器材概念视觉设计。

cases.author: RT

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Yokai Streetwear Identity Portrait

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Yokai Streetwear Identity Portrait
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 妖怪街头服饰风格形象肖像

cases.promptPreview: Create a vertical full-body anime streetwear identity portrait of {argument name="character name" default="a mysterious young woman"} standing centered and facing forward, with a deliberately soft blurred rectangular face for anonymity. She has very long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black hair with de...

prompts.en: Create a vertical full-body anime streetwear identity portrait of {argument name="character name" default="a mysterious young woman"} standing centered and facing forward, with a deliberately soft blurred rectangular face for anonymity. She has very long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black hair with deep teal highlights"} falling past her chest, and a large flat red circular halo/disc directly behind her head. Outfit: oversized black long-sleeve sweatshirt with a red square chest patch containing bold black Japanese calligraphy, loose cropped floral-pattern pants in muted green with red and beige flowers, black socks, and chunky white sneakers. Her hands hang together in front, holding one orange-red oni demon mask by its black horns; the handheld mask has angry eyes, black brows, tusks, and a grimacing mouth. Background: a dense Japanese yokai/oni mask mural in a hand-painted graphic style, using muted red, cream, teal-green, black, and tan. Include exactly eight large visible background mask/face motifs: 1 teal-green snarling mask at upper right, 2 cream cyclops mask at middle left, 3 pale rabbit-like figure with red ring at lower left, 4 cream square grinning face at left lower middle, 5 gray demon head at bottom left, 6 red skull-like panel face at middle right, 7 huge red oni face at bottom right, and 8 a crowded top strip of small red and cream grotesque masks. Add a horizontal cream sign with red Japanese-style characters behind the subject on the right, and rough black brush marks on red panels on the left. Visual style: moody editorial fashion illustration mixed with cel-shaded anime, thick ink outlines, painterly texture, slightly distressed poster surface, high detail, subdued vintage colors, symmetrical composition, low-angle full-body framing, no photorealism, no extra people, no watermark. Use {argument name="canvas ratio" default="9:16 vertical"} composition and a gritty Japanese folklore streetwear aesthetic.
prompts.zh: 创作一张垂直的全身动漫街头服饰形象肖像，主角为 {argument name="character name" default="一位神秘的年轻女性"}，居中站立并面向前方，面部经过刻意柔化模糊处理以保持匿名。她留着非常长的直发，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="带有深青色挑染的黑发"}，垂至胸前，头部正后方有一个巨大的红色圆形光环/圆盘。服装：超大款黑色长袖卫衣，胸前带有红色方形补丁，上面印有醒目的黑色日本书法；宽松的裁剪式花卉图案长裤，配色为柔和的绿色，点缀着红色和米色花朵；搭配黑色袜子和厚底白色运动鞋。她的双手垂在身前，握着一个橙红色鬼面具的黑色角；手持的面具带有愤怒的眼睛、黑色眉毛、獠牙和狰狞的嘴部。背景：一幅浓郁的日本妖怪/鬼面具壁画，采用手绘图形风格，使用柔和的红色、奶油色、青绿色、黑色和棕褐色。背景中需包含 8 个清晰可见的大型面具/脸部图案：1 右上角的青绿色咆哮面具，2 中左侧的奶油色独眼面具，3 左下角的淡色兔子状形象及红色圆环，4 左下中部的奶油色方形咧嘴脸，5 左下角的灰色恶魔头，6 中右侧的红色骷髅状面板脸，7 右下角的巨大红色鬼脸，8 顶部一排密集的红色和奶油色怪诞面具。在主体右侧添加一个带有红色日式字符的横向奶油色标牌，左侧红色面板上带有粗犷的黑色笔触。视觉风格：忧郁的时尚编辑插画与赛璐珞动漫风格的结合，粗墨线轮廓，绘画质感，略带磨损的海报表面，高细节，柔和的复古色调，对称构图，低角度全身取景，非写实风格，无额外人物，无水印。使用 {argument name="canvas ratio" default="9:16 垂直"} 构图，并呈现出粗犷的日本民俗街头服饰美学。

descriptions.en: Generates a vertical anime-style fashion identity portrait with an anonymous figure, oni mask prop, and dense Japanese yokai mural background.
descriptions.zh: 生成一张垂直的动漫风格时尚形象肖像，包含匿名人物、鬼面具道具以及浓郁的日本妖怪壁画背景。

cases.author: Cia0

cases.title: Social Media Post - Lo-fi Editorial Bedroom Portrait

titles.en: Social Media Post - Lo-fi Editorial Bedroom Portrait
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - Lo-fi 风格卧室人像摄影

cases.promptPreview: An intimate bedroom portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man in his early 20s"}, calm and slightly guarded expression, direct eye contact, standing relaxed. He wears a {argument name="clothing" default="textured knit sweater with a soft purple gradient fade"} and muted casual trousers. The background ...

prompts.en: An intimate bedroom portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man in his early 20s"}, calm and slightly guarded expression, direct eye contact, standing relaxed. He wears a {argument name="clothing" default="textured knit sweater with a soft purple gradient fade"} and muted casual trousers. The background is a personal room wall covered in taped polaroids, handwritten sketches, and concert ticket stubs. Shot at eye level on a 35mm lens with harsh on-camera flash, hard shadows behind subject, deep depth of field, slight vignetting and flash falloff. Real skin texture, visible blemishes, no retouching, noticeable film grain, subtle date stamp in corner. Muted neutral palette with soft lavender emphasis, natural warm skin tones, moderate contrast. Lo-fi editorial realism, late 90s / early 2000s candid diary aesthetic. No studio lighting, no beauty retouching, no clean minimal background.
prompts.zh: 一张私密的卧室人像，主角是 {argument name="subject" default="一位 20 出头的年轻人"}，表情平静且略带防备，直视镜头，站姿放松。他穿着 {argument name="clothing" default="带有柔和紫色渐变的针织毛衣"} 和色调柔和的休闲裤。背景是贴满拍立得照片、手写草图和演唱会票根的卧室墙壁。使用 35mm 镜头在平视角度拍摄，带有强烈的机顶闪光灯效果，主体后方有明显的硬阴影，深景深，带有轻微的暗角和闪光灯衰减效果。真实的皮肤纹理，可见瑕疵，无后期修图，有明显的胶片颗粒感，角落带有细微的日期戳。柔和的中性色调，强调淡紫色，自然的暖色肤色，中等对比度。Lo-fi 纪实风格，90 年代末至 2000 年代初的抓拍日记美学。无影棚灯光，无美颜修图，无干净的极简背景。

descriptions.en: A prompt for capturing a realistic, lo-fi bedroom portrait with a late 90s aesthetic, featuring harsh flash and intimate details.
descriptions.zh: 一个用于捕捉 90 年代末美学风格、具有强烈闪光灯效果和私密细节的写实 Lo-fi 卧室人像提示词。

The girl stands in the foreground hold...

prompts.en:
Create a highly detailed black-and-white manga illustration based on the uploaded photo while preserving the exact pose, composition, facial expressions, clothing, and camera angle. {argument name="subject" default="Two friends are taking a mirror selfie inside a modern elevator. The girl stands in the foreground holding a smartphone, wearing an oversized black hoodie, long dark hair, making an exaggerated screaming expression with one eye squinted. Behind her, the boy wears an oversized white hoodie with the hood up, also screaming dramatically with wide eyes and an open mouth, fists clenched in a playful pose."}

Illustrate everything using bold manga ink lines, clean contour work, expressive cross-hatching, fine pen strokes, subtle screentone shading, and dynamic comic-style line weight. Keep the elevator background minimal but recognizable with metallic panels and reflections. Add tiny manga emphasis lines around both heads to enhance the comedic energy.
prompts.zh:
根据上传的照片创作一幅高度精细的黑白漫画插图，同时保留原始的姿势、构图、面部表情、服装和拍摄角度。{argument name="subject" default="两个朋友在现代电梯里对着镜子自拍。女孩站在前景，手持智能手机，穿着超大号黑色连帽衫，留着长长的深色头发，做出夸张的尖叫表情，一只眼睛眯着。她身后的男孩穿着超大号白色连帽衫，戴着兜帽，同样睁大眼睛、张大嘴巴戏剧性地尖叫，拳头紧握，姿势俏皮。"}

使用粗犷的漫画墨线、干净的轮廓线条、富有表现力的排线、细腻的笔触、微妙的网点阴影以及动态的漫画风格线条粗细来绘制所有内容。保持电梯背景简洁但具有辨识度，体现金属面板和反射效果。在两人头部周围添加细小的漫画强调线，以增强喜剧氛围。

descriptions.en: A specialized prompt for transforming a realistic selfie into a detailed black-and-white manga illustration while maintaining exact proportions.
descriptions.zh: 一个专门用于将写实自拍照转换为精细黑白漫画插图的提示词，同时保持精确的比例。

prompts.en: Create a square 1:1 profile picture using the uploaded image as the exact reference for the pose, composition, and pixel art style. Recreate the subject as detailed retro pixel art with large, clearly visible pixels, crisp stepped edges, bold dark outlines, dramatic pixelated shading, vibrant colors, and the sharp look of a classic 16-bit/32-bit arcade sprite. Use only a solid {argument name="background color" default="Pantone 354C green"} background ({argument name="hex code" default="#00B140"}). Do not include gradients, textures, text, logos, extra objects, or any photorealistic elements. Keep the raised glove, facial features, framing, and overall style exactly the same as in the reference image.
prompts.zh: 使用上传的图片作为姿势、构图和像素艺术风格的精确参考，创作一张 1:1 的正方形头像。将主体重构为精致的复古像素艺术，要求像素清晰可见、边缘呈阶梯状、轮廓粗犷深邃、阴影效果具有戏剧性的像素感、色彩鲜艳，并呈现出经典 16 位/32 位街机游戏角色的锐利质感。背景仅使用纯色 {argument name="background color" default="Pantone 354C 绿色"} ({argument name="hex code" default="#00B140"})。请勿包含渐变、纹理、文字、Logo、额外物体或任何照片级真实元素。保持举起的手套、面部特征、取景范围以及整体风格与参考图完全一致。

Avoid polished vector-clean results, avoid overly crisp digital perfection, and keep the image simple, airy, flat, and understated. Use {argument name="accent color" default="sky blue"} only as the accent color.

cases.title: Product Marketing - GQ Fashion Editorial Cover

titles.en: Product Marketing - GQ Fashion Editorial Cover
titles.zh: 产品营销 - GQ 时尚杂志封面

cases.promptPreview: Ultra-realistic fashion editorial magazine cover showing {argument name="person" default="[REFERENCE PERSON]"} seated confidently on a low wooden pallet bench inside a contemporary creative studio. Outfit is fully monochrome: black denim jacket, wide-leg black trousers, black t-shirt, and black low-top canvas sneakers...

prompts.en: Ultra-realistic fashion editorial magazine cover showing {argument name="person" default="[REFERENCE PERSON]"} seated confidently on a low wooden pallet bench inside a contemporary creative studio. Outfit is fully monochrome: black denim jacket, wide-leg black trousers, black t-shirt, and black low-top canvas sneakers with white rubber soles and white laces. Sitting in a relaxed wide stance, leaning slightly forward, one elbow resting on the knee, one finger resting at the temple, gaze locked directly into the lens. Mood: calm, self-assured, visionary. Studio backdrop: a matte black wall lined with vertical wooden art panels painted in vivid geometric shapes, giving the space an elevated creative-agency feel. Warm cinematic lighting falls softly across the face and jacket, while rich shadows preserve dramatic editorial contrast. A natural textured woven rug sits beneath, adding warmth to the luxury studio setting. Cover layout uses a single typographic element only: oversized bold beige text at the very top spelling "{argument name="headline text" default="SHAMUS"}" in a wide condensed sans-serif, dominating the upper portion of the frame. Zero additional text anywhere, no subheadings, no captions, no handles, no dates, no watermarks, no logos. "{argument name="headline text" default="SHAMUS"}" is the sole word visible in the entire image. Color story: jet black, warm cream-beige, muted burnt orange, earthy brown, dusty teal, cinematic shadow tones. Centered, symmetrical crop with the visual weight of a GQ editorial, a high-end streetwear campaign, and a cinematic creator brand shoot. Captured on a 50mm prime lens, shallow depth of field, hyper-detailed skin and fabric texture, soft drop shadows, photorealistic lighting, clean type design, high-resolution editorial composition, 8K output, premium cinematic color grade.
prompts.zh: 超写实的时尚杂志封面，展示了 {argument name="person" default="[REFERENCE PERSON]"} 自信地坐在当代创意工作室的一张低矮木制托盘长凳上。服装采用全单色系：黑色牛仔夹克、黑色阔腿裤、黑色 T 恤，以及带有白色橡胶底和白色鞋带的黑色低帮帆布鞋。姿态放松，双腿张开，身体微微前倾，一只手肘撑在膝盖上，一根手指抵在太阳穴，目光直视镜头。氛围：冷静、自信、富有远见。工作室背景：一面哑光黑墙，排列着绘有生动几何图形的垂直木质艺术板，赋予空间一种高级创意机构的质感。温暖的电影级光线柔和地洒在脸部和夹克上，浓郁的阴影保留了戏剧性的杂志对比度。下方铺着一张天然纹理的编织地毯，为奢华的工作室环境增添了一抹暖意。封面排版仅使用一个排版元素：顶部采用超大号粗体米色文字，拼写出 "{argument name="headline text" default="SHAMUS"}"，字体为宽体压缩无衬线体，占据画面上方。画面中没有任何其他文字，没有副标题、说明文字、账号、日期、水印或 Logo。"{argument name="headline text" default="SHAMUS"}" 是整张图片中唯一可见的文字。色彩故事：喷气黑、暖奶油米色、柔和的焦橙色、大地棕、灰青色、电影级阴影色调。居中、对称裁剪，具有 GQ 杂志、高端街头服饰广告以及电影级创作者品牌拍摄的视觉分量。使用 50mm 定焦镜头拍摄，浅景深，超细腻的皮肤和织物纹理，柔和的投影，照片级真实光效，简洁的字体设计，高分辨率杂志构图，8K 输出，高级电影级调色。

descriptions.en: A detailed prompt for creating a realistic high-end fashion magazine cover with specific typography and studio art direction.
descriptions.zh: 一份用于创作写实高端时尚杂志封面的详细提示词，包含特定的排版和摄影艺术指导。

cases.title: Product Marketing - Avant-Garde Purple Fashion Editorial

titles.en: Product Marketing - Avant-Garde Purple Fashion Editorial
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 先锋派紫色时尚大片

cases.promptPreview: Hyper-realistic avant-garde fashion editorial of the {argument name="subject" default="uploaded person"}, preserving exact facial identity, proportions, and skin tone with absolute accuracy. The subject is seated on a distorted, sculptural {argument name="accent color" default="deep-purple"} form resembling a melted b...

prompts.en: Hyper-realistic avant-garde fashion editorial of the {argument name="subject" default="uploaded person"}, preserving exact facial identity, proportions, and skin tone with absolute accuracy. The subject is seated on a distorted, sculptural {argument name="accent color" default="deep-purple"} form resembling a melted bean bag, partially blending into the floor. The pose is intentionally constructed to emphasize perspective: one leg extends forward toward the camera, with the foot closest to the lens appearing larger due to perspective distortion, while the other leg remains bent and grounded. The forward shoe becomes a dominant visual anchor in the frame. The torso leans slightly backward with a subtle curve, shoulders relaxed but controlled. Hands rest loosely between the thighs, maintaining an editorial stiffness. The overall posture feels deliberate, asymmetrical, and slightly surreal. Wardrobe remains avant-garde: an oversized {argument name="accent color" default="deep-purple"} {argument name="clothing" default="trench coat"} with exaggerated proportions—elongated sleeves, sculptural collar, and strong silhouette. The coat is worn slightly off-shoulder to break symmetry. White wide-leg trousers maintain sharp, architectural folds. Footwear becomes a key focal point: chunky luxury sneakers in white with deep purple accents, positioned prominently toward the camera. The front shoe is closest to the lens, appearing visually larger with crisp detail, sharp texture, and strong lighting emphasis. Sole thickness is slightly exaggerated for a surreal, high-fashion effect. The second shoe remains slightly behind, partially de-emphasized. Set design is a surreal monochromatic purple cyclorama with subtle tonal inconsistencies. The seating form appears partially melted into the floor, enhancing the avant-garde mood. Lighting is directional and experimental: a strong off-center spotlight creates a halo behind the subject, while the foreground (especially the forward shoe) catches sharper highlights. A soft rim light separates the silhouette. Shadows are slightly stretched and imperfect, enhancing the surreal editorial tone. Camera setup is critical: low-angle shot combined with a slightly wide lens (35mm–50mm) to exaggerate perspective. The camera is positioned closer to the forward foot, making the shoe visually dominant while the face remains sharp and recognizable. Slight Dutch tilt adds tension. Expression is calm, detached, and editorial—minimal emotion, distant gaze. Color grading: deep, moody purples with controlled variation, clean but slightly muted whites, natural skin tones with subtle desaturation. Maintain high contrast but allow slight imperfection in gradients. Final output: ultra-detailed, 8K, photorealistic yet surreal, vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, high-fashion avant-garde editorial quality, strong depth perspective with foreground emphasis on footwear.
prompts.zh: 超写实先锋派时尚大片，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="上传的人物"}，精准保留其面部特征、比例及肤色。主角坐在一件扭曲的、雕塑感的 {argument name="accent color" default="深紫色"} 形态物体上，该物体形似融化的豆袋沙发，并部分与地面融合。姿势经过精心设计以强调透视感：一条腿向镜头方向伸展，靠近镜头的脚因透视畸变显得更大，另一条腿则保持弯曲并着地。前方的鞋子成为画面中主要的视觉锚点。躯干略微后倾，呈现微妙的曲线，双肩放松但姿态受控。双手自然地放在大腿之间，保持时尚大片特有的僵硬感。整体姿态刻意、不对称且略带超现实感。服装风格前卫：一件超大号的 {argument name="accent color" default="深紫色"} {argument name="clothing" default="风衣"}，比例夸张——袖子修长、衣领具有雕塑感，轮廓鲜明。风衣采用露肩穿法以打破对称感。白色阔腿裤呈现出利落的建筑感褶皱。鞋履是关键焦点：白色厚底奢华运动鞋，带有深紫色点缀，突出地朝向镜头。前方的鞋子最靠近镜头，视觉上显得更大，细节清晰，纹理锐利，光影强调感强。鞋底厚度略微夸张，营造出超现实的高级时尚效果。第二只鞋位于后方，视觉上略微弱化。场景设计为超现实的单色紫色无缝背景，带有微妙的色调不一致。座椅形态仿佛部分融化在地面中，增强了先锋氛围。灯光具有方向性和实验性：强烈的偏心聚光灯在主体后方形成光环，而前景（尤其是前方的鞋子）捕捉到更锐利的高光。柔和的轮廓光将主体与背景分离。阴影略微拉长且不完美，增强了超现实的编辑基调。相机设置至关重要：低角度拍摄结合略微广角镜头（35mm–50mm），以夸大透视效果。相机靠近前方的脚部，使鞋子在视觉上占据主导地位，同时保持面部清晰可辨。轻微的荷兰式倾斜（Dutch tilt）增加了张力。表情冷静、疏离，具有时尚大片感——情绪极简，目光深邃。色彩分级：深沉、忧郁的紫色，带有受控的色调变化，干净但略显柔和的白色，以及带有微妙去饱和度的自然肤色。保持高对比度，但允许渐变中存在轻微的不完美。最终输出：超精细、8K 分辨率、照片级真实感且带有超现实色彩，4:5 竖构图，高级时尚先锋大片质感，强烈的深度透视，前景重点突出鞋履。

descriptions.en: A surreal fashion prompt emphasizing perspective distortion and sculptural monochromatic elements in a high-fashion setting.
descriptions.zh: 一个超现实主义时尚提示词，强调透视畸变和雕塑感单色元素，营造高级时尚氛围。

cases.title: Product Marketing - Minimalist Fast Food Advertisement

titles.en: Product Marketing - Minimalist Fast Food Advertisement
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 极简主义快餐广告

cases.promptPreview: Create a minimalist commercial advertisement featuring an oversized {argument name="hero product" default="cheese pizza"} as the hero product in an ultra-clean, luxury campaign style. A young WOMAN dressed in an {argument name="outfit color" default="elegant all-pink AND white"} outfit leans casually against the giant...

prompts.en: Create a minimalist commercial advertisement featuring an oversized {argument name="hero product" default="cheese pizza"} as the hero product in an ultra-clean, luxury campaign style. A young WOMAN dressed in an {argument name="outfit color" default="elegant all-pink AND white"} outfit leans casually against the giant PIZZA in a relaxed yet confident pose, eyes gently closed, while holding a freshly made {argument name="brand name" default="pizza hut"} CHEESE PIZZA in both hand. The composition is modern and editorial, emphasizing scale, freshness, and visual impact. Use a soft gradient green-to-yellow background with large bold white AND BLACK “{argument name="brand name" default="PIZZA HUT"}” typography placed prominently behind the subject. Include a glossy reflective floor that subtly mirrors the sandwich and the model, enhanced with soft studio lighting and premium food photography aesthetics. Ensure the sandwich appears hyper-realistic, packed with fresh crisp lettuce, sliced tomatoes, cucumbers, onions, cheese, savory meat or veggie filling, signature sauces, and artisan bread with mouthwatering texture and detail. Maintain a clean, luxurious layout with balanced negative space and a sophisticated commercial look suitable for a high-end global advertising campaign. Add small text in the top-right corner reading “Designed by SHAMUS”. At the bottom center, place the tagline in small white font: “Freshly made. Delicious in every bite
prompts.zh: 创作一则极简主义商业广告，以超大号的 {argument name="hero product" default="芝士披萨"} 作为主打产品，呈现出超干净的奢华广告风格。一位身着 {argument name="outfit color" default="优雅的全粉色与白色"} 服装的年轻女性，以一种放松而自信的姿态随意倚靠在巨大的披萨旁，双眼微闭，双手捧着一份新鲜制作的 {argument name="brand name" default="Pizza Hut"} 芝士披萨。构图现代且具有杂志大片感，强调比例、新鲜度与视觉冲击力。背景采用柔和的绿到黄渐变色，主体后方醒目地放置着巨大的粗体白色与黑色 “{argument name="brand name" default="PIZZA HUT"}” 字样。地面采用光亮的反光材质，微妙地映衬出三明治和模特的身影，并辅以柔和的摄影棚灯光和高级食品摄影美学。确保三明治看起来超写实，配料包含新鲜爽脆的生菜、番茄片、黄瓜、洋葱、芝士、鲜美的肉类或蔬菜馅料、招牌酱汁以及质感诱人的手工面包，细节丰富。保持布局干净奢华，留白平衡，呈现出适合高端全球广告活动的精致商业质感。在右上角添加小字 “Designed by SHAMUS”。在底部中央，放置白色小字标语：“Freshly made. Delicious in every bite”

descriptions.en: Commercial advertising prompt for a hero product with clean, luxury editorial styling and branded typography.
descriptions.zh: 用于主打产品的商业广告提示词，采用干净、奢华的编辑风格及品牌排版。

cases.author: Al-Shamus

cases.title: Product Marketing - Night Bodega Musician Photography

titles.en: Product Marketing - Night Bodega Musician Photography
titles.zh: 产品营销 - 深夜便利店音乐人摄影

cases.promptPreview: Candid documentary-style photo, magazine-cover quality. A young male musician with {argument name="hair type" default="curly hair"} walks out of a {argument name="location" default="classic corner bodega"} late at night, a weathered guitar case hanging from his shoulder. Dual-temperature street lighting: an illuminate...

prompts.en: Candid documentary-style photo, magazine-cover quality. A young male musician with {argument name="hair type" default="curly hair"} walks out of a {argument name="location" default="classic corner bodega"} late at night, a weathered guitar case hanging from his shoulder. Dual-temperature street lighting: an illuminated neon "OPEN" sign throws a deep red-orange glow across his face, while a warm yellow sodium streetlight backlights him from behind. Shot on a {argument name="camera model" default="Canon AE-1"}, 50mm f/1.4 at maximum aperture, CineStill 800T film emulation. Soft red halation halos emanate from every neon source, tungsten color balance, and shadows carry a slight green-teal cast. Shallow depth of field, bokeh background. Cinematic night photography, photorealistic, highly detailed.
prompts.zh: 纪实风格抓拍，杂志封面级画质。一位留着 {argument name="hair type" default="卷发"} 的年轻男音乐人深夜走出一家 {argument name="location" default="经典街角便利店"}，肩上背着一个磨损的吉他盒。双色温街头光影：明亮的霓虹灯“OPEN”招牌在他脸上投射出深红橙色的光芒，而温暖的黄色钠灯则从背后为他勾勒出轮廓。使用 {argument name="camera model" default="Canon AE-1"} 拍摄，50mm f/1.4 最大光圈，模拟 CineStill 800T 胶片效果。霓虹光源处散发出柔和的红色光晕，钨丝灯白平衡，阴影带有轻微的青绿色调。浅景深，背景虚化。电影感夜景摄影，照片级真实感，细节丰富。

descriptions.en: A candid documentary-style night photo of a musician walking out of a neon-lit bodega, emulating vintage CineStill film aesthetics.
descriptions.zh: 一张纪实风格的深夜抓拍照片，描绘了一位音乐人走出霓虹闪烁的便利店，呈现出复古 CineStill 胶片的美学质感。

Preserve the original composition and characters, but simplify all details into {argument name="aesthetic" default="clean colorful flat shapes with a handmade childlike feel"}. Use {argument name="color...

prompts.en: Transform this photo into a {argument name="style" default="whimsical folk flat illustration"} with doodle elements. Preserve the original composition and characters, but simplify all details into {argument name="aesthetic" default="clean colorful flat shapes with a handmade childlike feel"}. Use {argument name="color palette" default="pastel and vibrant colors"}, rosy cheeks, playful line art, cute decorative symbols, flowers, birds, swirls, and cozy urban background details. The overall mood should feel warm, joyful, artistic, and charming like a modern children’s book illustration.
prompts.zh: 将这张照片转化为带有涂鸦元素的 {argument name="style" default="异想天开的民间扁平化插画"}。保留原始构图和人物，但将所有细节简化为 {argument name="aesthetic" default="干净、色彩丰富的扁平形状，带有手工童趣感"}。使用 {argument name="color palette" default="柔和且鲜艳的色彩"}，添加红润的脸颊、俏皮的线条艺术、可爱的装饰符号、花朵、鸟类、漩涡以及温馨的城市背景细节。整体氛围应感觉温暖、愉悦、富有艺术感且迷人，就像现代童书插画一样。

descriptions.en: A prompt to transform photos into a charming, colorful folk flat illustration with a handmade children's book aesthetic.
descriptions.zh: 一个将照片转化为迷人、色彩丰富的民间扁平化插画的提示词，具有手工童书的美感。

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Retro World Cup Pixel Sprite

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Retro World Cup Pixel Sprite
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 复古世界杯像素精灵

cases.promptPreview: Create a square-inspired FIFA World Cup 2026 profile portrait in a 4:5 aspect ratio using the uploaded image as the exact reference for pose, composition, identity, and pixel art style. Create the subject in a detailed {argument name="art style" default="retro pixel art style"} with large visible pixels, defined stair...

prompts.en: Create a square-inspired FIFA World Cup 2026 profile portrait in a 4:5 aspect ratio using the uploaded image as the exact reference for pose, composition, identity, and pixel art style. Create the subject in a detailed {argument name="art style" default="retro pixel art style"} with large visible pixels, defined stair-stepped edges, strong dark outlines, dramatic pixelated shading, vibrant colors, and a crisp 16-bit/32-bit arcade sprite appearance. Use only a flat solid background color representing the {argument name="country" default="selected country’s primary national color"}. The raised goalkeeper glove must feature the {argument name="national symbols" default="selected country’s national flag"} or official national colors. No gradients, textures, text, logos, extra objects, or photorealism. Subtly incorporate the FIFA World Cup 2026 theme and atmosphere while preserving the exact pose and composition from the reference. Maintain the raised glove, facial features, framing, and overall visual style exactly as shown in the reference image. Output aspect ratio: 4:5.
prompts.zh: 使用上传的图像作为姿势、构图、身份和像素艺术风格的精确参考，创作一张 4:5 比例的 2026 年 FIFA 世界杯风格方形头像。以详细的 {argument name="art style" default="复古像素艺术风格"} 创作主体，要求具有清晰可见的大像素、明显的阶梯状边缘、强烈的深色轮廓、戏剧性的像素化阴影、鲜艳的色彩以及清脆的 16 位/32 位街机精灵外观。仅使用代表 {argument name="country" default="所选国家主色调"} 的纯色背景。举起的守门员手套必须包含 {argument name="national symbols" default="所选国家的国旗"} 或官方国家配色。禁止使用渐变、纹理、文字、徽标、额外物体或照片写实风格。在保留参考图像中精确姿势和构图的同时，巧妙地融入 2026 年 FIFA 世界杯的主题和氛围。严格保持参考图像中显示的举起手套、面部特征、取景和整体视觉风格。输出长宽比：4:5。

descriptions.en: Converts a reference photo into a detailed 16-bit retro pixel art sprite inspired by the FIFA World Cup 2026.
descriptions.zh: 将参考照片转换为受 2026 年 FIFA 世界杯启发的 16 位复古像素艺术精灵。

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - FIFA World Cup Anime Poster

cases.promptPreview: Ultra detailed FIFA World Cup 2026 pop-art anime illustration of {argument name="subject" default="[SUBJECT]"}, close-up portrait, leaning forward, winking left eye, right eye looking directly at viewer, left hand holding a miniature {argument name="country emblem" default="[COUNTRY LOGO / EMBLEM]"} in front of her fa...

prompts.en: Ultra detailed FIFA World Cup 2026 pop-art anime illustration of {argument name="subject" default="[SUBJECT]"}, close-up portrait, leaning forward, winking left eye, right eye looking directly at viewer, left hand holding a miniature {argument name="country emblem" default="[COUNTRY LOGO / EMBLEM]"} in front of her face, face partially hidden behind the miniature emblem, confident playful expression. Aspect Ratio: 4:5 (vertical). Fixed composition: Keep original pose exactly the same. Object: Miniature {argument name="country emblem" default="[COUNTRY LOGO / EMBLEM]"}, detailed design. Background: Clean {argument name="background color" default="[BACKGROUND COLOR]"} square-inspired background with thin border, minimal retro manga poster design. Typography: Large bold vintage retro lettering below character displaying: "{argument name="custom text" default="[CUSTOM TEXT]"}". Style: Japanese pop art, manga illustration, fashion editorial poster, bold black outlines, vibrant cel shading, premium vector artwork.
prompts.zh: 超高细节的 2026 年 FIFA 世界杯波普艺术动漫插画，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="[SUBJECT]"}，特写肖像，身体前倾，左眼眨眼，右眼直视观众，左手在脸前拿着一个微型 {argument name="country emblem" default="[COUNTRY LOGO / EMBLEM]"}，脸部被微型徽章部分遮挡，表情自信俏皮。长宽比：4:5（竖屏）。固定构图：完全保持原始姿势。物体：微型 {argument name="country emblem" default="[COUNTRY LOGO / EMBLEM]"}，细节设计。背景：简洁的 {argument name="background color" default="[BACKGROUND COLOR]"} 方块灵感背景，带有细边框，极简复古漫画海报设计。排版：角色下方为醒目的复古粗体字，显示：“{argument name="custom text" default="[CUSTOM TEXT]"}”。风格：日本波普艺术、漫画插画、时尚杂志海报、粗黑色轮廓、鲜艳的赛璐珞阴影、高级矢量艺术。

descriptions.en: A high-detail Japanese pop-art anime illustration style for World Cup 2026 portraits, maintaining identity and pose from a reference.
descriptions.zh: 一种高细节的日本波普艺术动漫插画风格，用于 2026 年世界杯肖像创作，保持参考图中的人物特征和姿势。

cases.title: Social Media Post - Cinematic Luxury Editorial Portrait

titles.en: Social Media Post - Cinematic Luxury Editorial Portrait
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 电影级奢华时尚人像

cases.promptPreview: Create an ultra-realistic, internet-breaking portrait of an extraordinarily beautiful young woman with flawless porcelain skin, mesmerizing light eyes, and impossibly long, voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="raven-black"} curls cascading like liquid silk across her shoulders and body. She gazes {argument ...

prompts.en: Create an ultra-realistic, internet-breaking portrait of an extraordinarily beautiful young woman with flawless porcelain skin, mesmerizing light eyes, and impossibly long, voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="raven-black"} curls cascading like liquid silk across her shoulders and body. She gazes {argument name="gaze direction" default="off-camera"} with a dreamy, mysterious expression that feels cinematic, romantic, and unforgettable. Shot in a softly lit luxury apartment during golden afternoon light, warm sunlight gently wraps around her face, highlighting delicate skin texture, glossy lips, defined brows, and naturally radiant features. Her oversized cascading curls dominate the frame, creating dramatic visual impact and irresistible depth. She wears a minimal light-toned top that enhances the elegant, effortless aesthetic. The composition is perfectly optimized for social media virality: close-up framing, powerful eye-line, rich hair movement, shallow depth of field, and luxury lifestyle atmosphere. Background features warm wooden interiors, artistic décor, subtle vintage elements, and creamy bokeh that keeps all attention on the subject. Hyper-realistic photography, fashion editorial quality, luxury influencer aesthetic, cinematic color grading, dreamy mood, viral Instagram portrait, TikTok trending style, natural beauty, photorealistic skin texture, ultra-sharp focus on eyes, HDR detail, {argument name="lens" default="85mm"} lens, f/1.4, full-frame camera, masterpiece quality, magazine cover composition, soft ambient lighting, high-end lifestyle photography, award-winning portrait, 8K resolution, breathtaking realism, scroll-stopping visual impact. Aspect Ratio: 3:4 (portrait orientation) Style: Luxury editorial × cinematic beauty × viral social media photography Quality Tags: ultra realistic, masterpiece, best quality, photorealistic, cinematic, trending, viral, 8k, HDR, highly detailed, professional fashion photography.
prompts.zh: 创作一张超写实、极具网络传播力的人像，主角是一位拥有完美无瑕瓷肌、迷人浅色眼眸的绝美年轻女性，她那不可思议的长而蓬松的 {argument name="hair color" default="乌黑"} 卷发如液态丝绸般倾泻在肩头和身上。她 {argument name="gaze direction" default="看向镜头外"} 的眼神流露出梦幻而神秘的神情，充满电影感、浪漫且令人难忘。拍摄于午后金光洒入的柔光奢华公寓内，温暖的阳光轻柔地包裹着她的脸庞，凸显出细腻的皮肤纹理、光泽的双唇、精致的眉形以及自然焕发的容颜。她那夸张的瀑布般卷发占据了画面主体，营造出强烈的视觉冲击力和难以抗拒的深度感。她身着简约的浅色上衣，衬托出优雅、随性的美感。构图针对社交媒体传播进行了完美优化：特写镜头、极具感染力的视线、丰富的发丝动态、浅景深以及奢华的生活方式氛围。背景呈现出温暖的木质内饰、艺术装饰、微妙的复古元素以及奶油般的虚化效果，将所有注意力集中在主体上。超写实摄影，时尚杂志大片质感，奢华网红美学，电影级调色，梦幻氛围，Instagram 爆款人像，TikTok 流行风格，自然美，照片级皮肤纹理，焦点精准聚焦于双眼，HDR 细节，{argument name="lens" default="85mm"} 镜头，f/1.4，全画幅相机，大师级品质，杂志封面构图，柔和环境光，高端生活方式摄影，获奖级人像，8K 分辨率，令人惊叹的真实感，令人驻足的视觉冲击力。宽高比：3:4（竖构图） 风格：奢华时尚 × 电影级美学 × 社交媒体爆款摄影 品质标签：超写实，大师之作，最佳品质，照片级真实，电影感，潮流，病毒式传播，8k，HDR，高细节，专业时尚摄影。

descriptions.en: An ultra-realistic prompt for high-end fashion photography, focusing on liquid-silk hair texture, porcelain skin, and luxury interior bokeh.
descriptions.zh: 一款用于高端时尚摄影的超写实提示词，聚焦于如丝般顺滑的头发质感、瓷器般的肌肤以及奢华室内背景虚化效果。

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Minimalist Marker Sketch Doodle

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Minimalist Marker Sketch Doodle
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 极简马克笔涂鸦素描

cases.promptPreview: Convert the uploaded photo into a cute black-and-white hand-drawn doodle illustration in the exact style of a {argument name="art style" default="minimalist marker sketch"}. Preserve the original composition, pose, camera angle, facial expressions, clothing, and positioning of all subjects. Transform the people into a...

prompts.en: Convert the uploaded photo into a cute black-and-white hand-drawn doodle illustration in the exact style of a {argument name="art style" default="minimalist marker sketch"}. Preserve the original composition, pose, camera angle, facial expressions, clothing, and positioning of all subjects. Transform the people into adorable {argument name="character style" default="chibi/cartoon characters"} with simplified features, large expressive eyes, rounded faces, and clean outlines. Style requirements:
prompts.zh: 将上传的照片转换为 {argument name="art style" default="极简马克笔素描"} 风格的可爱黑白手绘涂鸦插画。保留原始构图、姿势、拍摄角度、面部表情、服装以及所有主体的位置。将人物转换为可爱的 {argument name="character style" default="Q 版/卡通角色"}，特征包括简化的五官、大而富有表现力的眼睛、圆润的脸庞和清晰的轮廓。风格要求：

descriptions.en: A transformation prompt that converts photos into cute, black-and-white chibi-style marker sketches while preserving the original pose and composition.
descriptions.zh: 一个可以将照片转换为可爱的黑白 Q 版马克笔素描的转换提示词，同时保留原始姿势和构图。

cases.promptPreview: Soft motion-blur fine art photography of {argument name="subject" default="SUBJECT"}, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="CLOTHING"}, {argument name="action" default="POSE"} with {argument name="companion" default="COMPANION"} in {argument name="location" default="SCENERY"}. Use [PALETTE], diffused window light, ...

prompts.en: Soft motion-blur fine art photography of {argument name="subject" default="SUBJECT"}, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="CLOTHING"}, {argument name="action" default="POSE"} with {argument name="companion" default="COMPANION"} in {argument name="location" default="SCENERY"}. Use [PALETTE], diffused window light, slow-shutter camera movement, gentle panning blur, creamy soft focus, translucent ghosted edges, shallow depth of field, low contrast, warm film grain, pale highlights, muted shadows, and an intimate dreamlike atmosphere. The background is [BACKGROUND], softly smeared by motion with painterly streaks, delicate reflections, quiet negative space, and a nostalgic editorial photography finish, aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.zh: 柔和动态模糊的艺术摄影作品，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="SUBJECT"}，身着 {argument name="outfit" default="CLOTHING"}，正与 {argument name="companion" default="COMPANION"} 在 {argument name="location" default="SCENERY"} 中 {argument name="action" default="POSE"}。使用 [PALETTE] 色调，漫射窗光，慢快门相机移动，轻柔平移模糊，奶油般柔焦，半透明重影边缘，浅景深，低对比度，温暖胶片颗粒，浅色高光，柔和阴影，营造出亲密梦幻的氛围。背景为 [BACKGROUND]，通过动态模糊呈现出柔和的涂抹感，带有油画般的线条、细腻的反射、宁静的留白，以及怀旧的编辑摄影质感，长宽比 4:5。

descriptions.en: A dreamlike fine art photography prompt using slow-shutter blur and window light to create intimate, nostalgic editorial images.
descriptions.zh: 一个梦幻般的艺术摄影提示词，利用慢快门模糊和窗光效果，营造出亲密、怀旧的编辑风格影像。

cases.title: Social Media Post - Elegant Editorial Floral Portrait

titles.en: Social Media Post - Elegant Editorial Floral Portrait
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 优雅时尚花卉人像

cases.promptPreview: An elegant fashion editorial portrait of a young woman with a tousled chin-length dark brunette bob, seated in a relaxed yet refined pose while gently cradling a bouquet of {argument name="flower types" default="blush pink lilies, anemones, and delicate seasonal blooms"}. Soft lavender flowers appear out of focus in t...

prompts.en: An elegant fashion editorial portrait of a young woman with a tousled chin-length dark brunette bob, seated in a relaxed yet refined pose while gently cradling a bouquet of {argument name="flower types" default="blush pink lilies, anemones, and delicate seasonal blooms"}. Soft lavender flowers appear out of focus in the foreground, adding a dreamy layered depth and a natural cinematic frame. Wardrobe & Styling: Flowing satin camisole dress in a rich {argument name="dress color" default="fuchsia-rose tone"} with slender shoulder straps and a graceful silhouette. Delicate floral stud earrings in soft pink hues paired with understated gold rings for a refined luxury touch. Beauty look inspired by modern East Asian editorial trends, featuring luminous peach blush swept across the cheeks and lightly over the bridge of the nose, softly diffused crimson gradient lips, subtle smoky brown eyeshadow, and naturally defined lashes. Voluminous dark brown textured bob with loose waves and feathered curtain bangs softly framing the face. Photography: Captured with a {argument name="camera model" default="Canon EOS R5 or Leica M11"} for exceptional detail and natural color reproduction. 85mm f/1.2 portrait lens creating an ultra-shallow depth of field with silky, creamy background separation. Gentle window light from a north-facing source produces flattering illumination, smooth skin texture, and a radiant glass-skin finish without harsh shadows. Art Direction: Neutral studio environment with flowing beige drapery and minimal styling to emphasize the model and floral arrangement. Muted vintage-inspired color grading with restrained saturation, warm natural skin tones, and striking contrast between the vivid pink dress and lush green stems. Fine editorial detail, soft organic textures, subtle film-like character, luxurious magazine-quality composition, photorealistic finish.
prompts.zh: 一张优雅的时尚人像，主角是一位留着凌乱下巴长度深棕色波波头的年轻女性，她以一种放松而精致的姿态坐着，怀中轻捧着一束 {argument name="flower types" default="淡粉色百合、银莲花和精致的时令花卉"}。前景中模糊的淡紫色花朵增添了梦幻的层次感，并形成了自然的电影级画框。服装与造型：飘逸的缎面吊带裙，呈现出浓郁的 {argument name="dress color" default="紫红色调"}，配有细肩带和优雅的剪裁。搭配柔粉色调的精致花卉耳钉和低调的金色戒指，尽显奢华质感。妆容灵感源自现代东亚时尚趋势，脸颊及鼻梁处扫上透亮的桃色腮红，唇部采用柔和的深红色渐变效果，搭配细腻的烟熏棕色眼影和自然分明的睫毛。丰盈的深棕色质感波波头带有松散的波浪和轻盈的法式刘海，柔和地修饰脸型。摄影：使用 {argument name="camera model" default="Canon EOS R5 或 Leica M11"} 拍摄，呈现卓越的细节和自然的色彩还原。85mm f/1.2 人像镜头营造出超浅景深，背景虚化如丝般柔滑。来自北向窗户的柔和光线提供了理想的照明，使皮肤质感平滑，呈现出透亮的“玻璃肌”效果，且无生硬阴影。艺术指导：中性色调的摄影棚环境，配以飘逸的米色帷幔和极简造型，以突出模特与花艺布置。采用复古风格的低饱和度调色，保留温暖自然的肤色，同时形成鲜艳粉色裙装与翠绿花茎之间的强烈对比。精致的时尚细节，柔和的有机质感，微妙的胶片质感，奢华的杂志级构图，照片级真实效果。

descriptions.en: A high-end editorial portrait of a woman holding lilies, featuring luminous skin and a dreamy shallow depth of field.
descriptions.zh: 一张高端时尚人像，描绘了一位手持百合花的女性，展现出透亮肌肤与梦幻般的浅景深效果。

cases.title: YouTube Thumbnail - Cinematic Suburban Chase Scene

titles.en: YouTube Thumbnail - Cinematic Suburban Chase Scene
titles.zh: YouTube 缩略图 - 电影感郊区追逐场景

cases.promptPreview: Cinematic ultra-realistic close pursuit scene, camera positioned less than one meter in front of the fleeing husband, extreme close-up perspective, {argument name="man expression" default="terrified"} man dominating 80% of the frame, sweat on skin, visible pores, bloodshot eyes, veins bulging in neck, mouth wide open ...

prompts.en: Cinematic ultra-realistic close pursuit scene, camera positioned less than one meter in front of the fleeing husband, extreme close-up perspective, {argument name="man expression" default="terrified"} man dominating 80% of the frame, sweat on skin, visible pores, bloodshot eyes, veins bulging in neck, mouth wide open screaming in pure panic, messy hair blown backward from sprinting, wrinkled dark pajama shirt, one slipper missing. Behind him, slightly out of focus but still clearly visible, furious woman exploding out of the front door wearing a {argument name="wife outfit" default="bathrobe and fluffy slippers"}, wielding a heavy cast iron frying pan raised above her head, face twisted with uncontrollable rage, hair flying wildly in every direction. Breakfast chaos erupting through the air between them, shattered coffee mugs, flying toast, scrambled eggs, orange juice droplets frozen in motion, tiny debris particles catching sunlight. Real suburban house entrance, concrete walkway, front lawn, authentic residential neighborhood. Shot on {argument name="camera model" default="Arri Alexa 35"}, Zeiss Supreme Prime 35mm T1.5, camera operator running backwards directly in front of the husband, cinematic chase photography, realistic motion blur only on limbs and background, sharp focus locked on the husband's terrified face. Golden hour morning sunlight from side angle, physically accurate skin rendering, subsurface scattering, natural shadows, realistic reflections in eyes, documentary-style realism, Hollywood comedy movie frame, practical lighting, Kodak Vision3 film emulation, subtle film grain, hyperrealistic, ultra detailed, RAW photo quality, photorealistic, no CGI, no cartoon, no AI look, no overprocessed HDR, 8K, masterpiece, award-winning cinematic photography, dynamic Dutch angle, extreme sense of speed and urgency, vertical composition --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 8
prompts.zh: 电影级超写实近距离追逐场景，摄像机位于逃跑丈夫前方不到一米处，极度特写视角，{argument name="man expression" default="惊恐"} 男子占据画面 80%，皮肤上的汗水、清晰可见的毛孔、充血的双眼、颈部青筋暴起，嘴巴大张发出惊恐的尖叫，凌乱的头发因奔跑向后飞扬，穿着皱巴巴的深色睡衣，丢了一只拖鞋。在他身后，背景略微失焦但清晰可见，愤怒的妻子穿着 {argument name="wife outfit" default="浴袍和毛绒拖鞋"} 从前门冲出，手中挥舞着高举过头的沉重铸铁平底锅，面部因无法抑制的愤怒而扭曲，头发向四面八方狂乱飞舞。早餐的混乱在两人之间爆发，破碎的咖啡杯、飞溅的吐司、炒蛋、凝固在空中的橙汁液滴，细小的碎片在阳光下闪烁。真实的郊区房屋入口、混凝土人行道、前草坪，地道的住宅区环境。使用 {argument name="camera model" default="Arri Alexa 35"} 拍摄，搭配 Zeiss Supreme Prime 35mm T1.5 镜头，摄影师在丈夫正前方倒退奔跑，电影级追逐摄影，仅在四肢和背景处保留真实的动态模糊，焦点锁定在丈夫惊恐的面部。黄金时刻的侧向晨光，物理级精准的皮肤渲染，次表面散射，自然阴影，眼中真实的倒影，纪录片风格的写实感，好莱坞喜剧电影画面，实用照明，Kodak Vision3 胶片模拟，细腻的胶片颗粒感，超写实，极致细节，RAW 照片画质，照片级真实，无 CGI，无卡通感，无 AI 感，无过度处理的 HDR，8K，杰作，屡获殊荣的电影摄影，动态荷兰式倾斜构图，极强的速度感与紧迫感，竖构图 --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 8

descriptions.en: An intense and comedic chase scene captured with cinematic precision in a suburban neighborhood.
descriptions.zh: 在郊区社区中捕捉到的充满紧张感与喜剧色彩的追逐场景，呈现电影级的精准质感。

Use a {argument name="color palette" default="red, yellow, and white"} color palette. Include ketchup splash graphics, dripping melted cheese, comic burst shap...

prompts.en: Create a vertical poster ad featuring an {argument name="character" default="uploaded character"} as the main subject. Shoot from a low angle with a wide lens. Use a {argument name="color palette" default="red, yellow, and white"} color palette. Include ketchup splash graphics, dripping melted cheese, comic burst shapes, retro American diner typography, and a bold {argument name="aesthetic" default="fast food collage"} aesthetic.

cases.title: Social Media Post - Moonlit Bamboo Forest Ancient Portrait

titles.en: Social Media Post - Moonlit Bamboo Forest Ancient Portrait
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 月下竹林古风人像

cases.promptPreview: 9:16 vertical, high-precision ancient style xianxia moonlit female portrait, Tang Dynasty fantasy aesthetic, gorgeously refined character photography feel, overall high-end, dreamy, transparent, and quiet, with poster-level completion for an Oriental fantasy lead. The main subject is a young adult Oriental woman, visu...

prompts.en:
9:16 vertical, high-precision ancient style xianxia moonlit female portrait, Tang Dynasty fantasy aesthetic, gorgeously refined character photography feel, overall high-end, dreamy, transparent, and quiet, with poster-level completion for an Oriental fantasy lead. The main subject is a young adult Oriental woman, visual age approx. {argument name="age" default="20–28 years old"}, with natural and clear Oriental female features. She has refined features, clean facial lines, slender almond eyes, a cold, detached, quiet, ethereal, and restrained gaze, a delicate nose, and naturally soft lips. Skin is cold white, delicate, and transparent under soft moonlight.

Makeup is a cold white moonlight look, ethereal in density, emphasizing eyes and highlights. Base is cold white and transparent; eye makeup is softly blended with light gray-pink, cold light brown, silver-white pearl, and light cold purple-gray; aegyosal is naturally brightened, blush is light cold pink, lip makeup is light rose pink or cold petal color, overall clean and refined.

Hairstyle is black smooth long hair in a high bun with falling strands. Headwear is high-grade gold crowns, slender hairpins, pearl tassels, and jade embellishments. Clothing is a cross-collared ancient style robe with a light gauze cape, using a {argument name="color scheme" default="jade green, white, and gold"} palette. Fabric is silk-like with bamboo leaf or cloud embroidery, and a refined waistband with jade pendants.

Scene is in a {argument name="scene" default="snow-covered bamboo courtyard and moonlit stone steps"}. The character is the absolute visual center in a moonlit courtyard with blurred snow-bamboo bokeh. Lighting is cold white soft moonlight with obvious rim light on hair. The overall image is transparent, clean, and high-end.
prompts.zh:
9:16 竖屏，高精度古风仙侠月下女性人像，唐代奇幻美学，极致细腻的人物摄影质感，整体高端、梦幻、通透且静谧，具备海报级的东方奇幻主角完成度。主体为一名年轻的东方女性，视觉年龄约 {argument name="age" default="20–28 岁"}，拥有自然清秀的东方女性特征。五官精致，面部线条干净，细长的杏眼，眼神清冷、疏离、静谧、空灵且内敛，鼻梁挺拔，唇形自然柔和。在柔和的月光下，肤色冷白、细腻且通透。

妆容为冷白月光妆，质感空灵，强调眼妆与高光。底妆冷白通透；眼妆采用浅灰粉、冷棕色、银白珠光与浅冷紫灰柔和晕染；卧蚕自然提亮，腮红为浅冷粉色，唇妆为浅玫瑰粉或冷花瓣色，整体干净精致。

发型为黑色顺滑长发，梳高髻并垂下发丝。头饰为高级金冠、细发簪、珍珠流苏及玉石点缀。服饰为交领古风长袍搭配轻纱披肩，采用 {argument name="color scheme" default="玉绿、白与金"} 配色。面料呈丝绸质感，带有竹叶或云纹刺绣，配有精致的腰封与玉佩。

场景位于 {argument name="scene" default="积雪的竹林庭院与月下石阶"}。人物是月下庭院的绝对视觉中心，背景为虚化的雪竹光斑。光影为冷白色柔和月光，发丝带有明显的轮廓光。整体画面通透、干净且高级。

descriptions.en: A high-precision prompt for creating a cinematic, ethereal portrait of a woman in a moonlit snow-covered bamboo courtyard.
descriptions.zh: 一个高精度提示词，用于创作一张电影感、空灵的女性人像，场景设定在月光下的积雪竹林庭院中。

cases.author: 李岳

cases.title: Social Media Post - Backlit Atmospheric Portrait Photography

titles.en: Social Media Post - Backlit Atmospheric Portrait Photography
titles.zh: 社交媒体帖子 - 背光氛围感人像摄影

cases.promptPreview: A realistic portrait photography work: {argument name="identity" default="a young woman"} standing sideways by an indoor window, captured in a medium-close-up composition. Her body is slightly turned, hands naturally placed in front, posture relaxed and restrained, presenting a state of quiet contemplation. Her facial...

prompts.en:
A realistic portrait photography work: {argument name="identity" default="a young woman"} standing sideways by an indoor window, captured in a medium-close-up composition. Her body is slightly turned, hands naturally placed in front, posture relaxed and restrained, presenting a state of quiet contemplation. Her facial expression is soft, with eyes closed or head slightly lowered, conveying an introverted and peaceful emotion.

Her hairstyle is a clean bun, and the overall look is simple and sharp. She wears a {argument name="clothing material" default="thin white shirt with a semi-transparent cotton-linen texture"}, which exhibits a soft light-transmitting effect under natural light. The clothing fits the body while maintaining a comfortable and natural sense of relaxation.

The environment is an indoor window scene with a blurred view outside, showing a faint city or natural background. The focus is on the natural light from the golden hour outside shining in from the side and back, creating a soft rim light that outlines the shoulders, neck, and body lines, while producing a warm light-and-shadow penetration effect on the clothes.

Shallow depth of field is used throughout, keeping the main subject sharp and clear while the background is softly blurred, enhancing the sense of spatial layers and cinematic atmosphere.

The style is minimalist realistic portrait photography with a lifestyle photography texture. The color palette is dominated by {argument name="color palette" default="warm beige, light gold, and soft white"}. The overall atmosphere is quiet, gentle, and introverted, with a subtle cinematic feel and high-end natural light portrait quality.
prompts.zh:
一幅写实人像摄影作品：{argument name="identity" default="一位年轻女性"} 侧身站在室内窗边，采用中近景构图。身体微微转动，双手自然置于身前，姿态放松而克制，呈现出一种静谧沉思的状态。面部表情柔和，双眼微闭或头部微垂，传达出内敛而平和的情绪。

发型为干练的盘发，整体造型简洁利落。她穿着 {argument name="clothing material" default="一件带有半透明棉麻质感的薄白衬衫"}，在自然光下呈现出柔和的透光效果。衣物贴合身形，同时保持着舒适自然的松弛感。

环境为室内窗边场景，窗外景色虚化，隐约可见城市或自然背景。焦点在于来自窗外“黄金时刻”的自然光从侧后方射入，形成柔和的轮廓光，勾勒出肩颈及身体线条，同时在衣物上产生温暖的光影穿透效果。

全程使用浅景深，使主体清晰锐利，背景柔和虚化，增强了空间层次感和电影氛围。

风格为极简写实人像摄影，兼具生活方式摄影的质感。色调以 {argument name="color palette" default="暖米色、浅金色和柔白色"} 为主。整体氛围安静、温柔且内敛，具有微妙的电影感和高端自然光人像品质。

descriptions.en: A professional photography prompt for creating realistic portraits with soft backlighting and a serene atmosphere, ideal for cinematic lifestyle shots.
descriptions.zh: 一个专业的摄影提示词，用于创作具有柔和背光和宁静氛围的写实人像，非常适合电影感的生活方式摄影。

cases.author: 路飞 🏴‍☠️ AI 研究员🧐

cases.title: Profile / Avatar - Watercolor Silhouette Character Story

titles.en: Profile / Avatar - Watercolor Silhouette Character Story
titles.zh: 个人资料 / 头像 - 水彩剪影角色故事

cases.promptPreview: [Information Entry Field] Character Name: [{argument name="character name" default=""}] (Required) Pose Number: [{argument name="pose number" default="0"}] (Optional: Select from 0-10, auto-generated if blank) Additional Notes: [{argument name="additional notes" default=""}] (Enter anything specific you want to tell t...

prompts.en:
[Information Entry Field]

Character Name: [{argument name="character name" default=""}] (Required)

Pose Number: [{argument name="pose number" default="0"}] (Optional: Select from 0-10, auto-generated if blank)

Additional Notes: [{argument name="additional notes" default=""}] (Enter anything specific you want to tell the AI)

-----------------

Analyze the attached image and generate a high-quality 2D animation-style illustration named [Character Name]. The final image should be a 'shadow-style watercolor poetic single illustration' where the character's presence quietly floats on white to off-white paper. Focus on silhouettes, soft bleeding, negative space, and paper texture rather than detailed drawings. Adopt the pose specified by [Pose Number]. If 0 or blank, the AI should choose one that fits the character's look/personality. The AI should determine the most suitable main color based on the character's hair, eyes, and clothing instead of fixing a color. Use a palette centered on the main color with dark shadow colors and light watercolor bleeding. Do not over-draw features; keep the hairstyle outline, clothing shape, and unique traits recognizable as a silhouette. Background should have wide negative space with minimal watercolor bleeding, plant shadows, or star dust. Automatically create a short, beautiful title based on the atmosphere and place it with the character name in the upper right or an unobtrusive spot. Maintain silence, elegance, and a poetic atmosphere throughout. Style: High-quality 2D animation. Aspect Ratio: 3:4.
prompts.zh:
[信息输入栏]

角色名称：[{argument name="character name" default=""}]（必填）

姿势编号：[{argument name="pose number" default="0"}]（选填：从 0-10 中选择，留空则自动生成）

补充说明：[{argument name="additional notes" default=""}]（输入任何你想告诉 AI 的具体要求）

-----------------

分析所附图像，并生成一张名为 [Character Name] 的高质量 2D 动画风格插画。最终图像应为“阴影风格水彩诗意单幅插画”，角色的形象应静静地浮现在白色至灰白色的纸张上。重点表现剪影、柔和的晕染、留白以及纸张纹理，而非细节描绘。采用 [Pose Number] 指定的姿势。如果为 0 或留空，AI 应选择一个符合角色外观或性格的姿势。AI 应根据角色的头发、眼睛和服装确定最合适的主色调，而非固定颜色。使用以主色调为中心，搭配深色阴影和浅色水彩晕染的调色板。不要过度绘制特征；保持发型轮廓、服装形状和独特特征，使其作为剪影依然可辨。背景应有大面积留白，并带有极简的水彩晕染、植物阴影或星尘。根据氛围自动创作一个简短优美的标题，并将其与角色名称一起放置在右上角或不显眼的位置。全程保持静谧、优雅和诗意的氛围。风格：高质量 2D 动画。宽高比：3:4。

descriptions.en: An extensive prompt for transforming character images into poetic watercolor shadow-style illustrations with titles.
descriptions.zh: 一个用于将角色图像转换为带有标题的诗意水彩阴影风格插画的详细提示词。

cases.title: Comic / Storyboard - Otherworldly Dragon Girl Fire Shop

titles.en: Comic / Storyboard - Otherworldly Dragon Girl Fire Shop
titles.zh: 漫画 / 故事板 - 异世界龙女的火焰商店

cases.promptPreview: [The Shopkeeper from Another World] A fire that cannot return, lit in the capital of Slovenia. {argument name="protagonist" default="Mireia, a dragon-tribe girl from the land of flame scales, Nevia"}. While escaping from a crumbling volcanic temple, she was sucked into a burning mirror and transported to {argument nam...

prompts.en:
[The Shopkeeper from Another World]
A fire that cannot return, lit in the capital of Slovenia.

{argument name="protagonist" default="Mireia, a dragon-tribe girl from the land of flame scales, Nevia"}.
While escaping from a crumbling volcanic temple, she was sucked into a burning mirror and transported to {argument name="location" default="the riverside of Ljubljana, the capital of Slovenia"}.

Although she hasn't found a way back yet, she has hands that can handle fire.

On the shelves are:
{argument name="product" default="Magic lamps that don't cool down even at night"},
small fire bottles that glow blue when touched,
glass candle holders that mimic dragon scales,
and tinderboxes shaped like old keys.

The old lady, the boy, and the passing painter all smile a little when they see the light.

So today, she opens her shop in this city again.
prompts.zh:
[来自异世界的店主]
一团无法归去的火焰，在斯洛文尼亚的首都点燃。

{argument name="protagonist" default="Mireia，一位来自烈焰鳞片之地 Nevia 的龙族少女"}。
在逃离一座即将崩塌的火山神庙时，她被吸入了一面燃烧的镜子，并被传送到了 {argument name="location" default="斯洛文尼亚首都卢布尔雅那的河畔"}。

虽然她还没找到回去的方法，但她拥有一双能驾驭火焰的手。

货架上摆放着：
{argument name="product" default="即使在深夜也不会冷却的魔法灯"}，
触碰时会发出蓝光的微型火瓶，
模仿龙鳞纹理的玻璃烛台，
以及造型如古老钥匙的火绒盒。

老妇人、小男孩和路过的画家，在看到那光芒时，脸上都露出了淡淡的微笑。

于是今天，她又在这座城市里开张了。

descriptions.en: A rich, narrative-driven prompt describing a dragon-girl shopkeeper in Slovenia who sells magical fire-themed items like lamps and candle holders.
descriptions.zh: 一个丰富且具有叙事性的提示词，描述了一位在斯洛文尼亚经营魔法火焰主题商品（如灯具和烛台）的龙女店主。
